# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio jwt validation weak.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-jwt-authentication
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
    - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
      jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
      audiences:
        - "api.example.com"
      forwardOriginalToken: false
      fromHeaders:
        - name: Authorization
          prefix: "Bearer "
      outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
      outputClaimToHeaders:
        - header: "x-jwt-sub"
          claim: "sub"
        - header: "x-jwt-email"
          claim: "email"
        - header: "x-jwt-roles"
          claim: "roles"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt-authentication
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notRequestPrincipals:
              - "*"
      to:
        - operation:
            notPaths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-rbac-policy
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://auth.example.com/*"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/public/*"
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://auth.example.com/*"
      when:
        - key: request.auth.claims[roles]
          values:
            - "admin"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/admin/*"
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://auth.example.com/*"
      when:
        - key: request.auth.claims[roles]
          values:
            - "user"
            - "admin"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
            paths:
              - "/api/v1/resources/*"
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
